summary: Completed comprehensive testing of mobile login bug fixes (Iteration 4). All 15 backend tests passed. All placeholder text visibility fixes verified. Main app screens load without crashing.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web TouchableOpacity click handling requires workarounds in Playwright (double elements, visibility issues)
integration_issues.note: This is a web preview limitation, not a mobile app bug

issues: shadow* style props deprecation warnings (cosmetic, not functional)
Expo Router warning: 'No route named auth-callback exists' - Expected behavior, auth-callback is backend endpoint

critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix #1 verified: Login endpoint (line 248-256) auto-sets password for Google-only users instead of crashing
Bug Fix #2 verified: Register endpoint (line 193-208) merges Google-only accounts by setting password_hash
Placeholder Fix verified: All 6 files have placeholderTextColor='#888' set on all TextInput components
Database cleanup verified: All test users removed as expected

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All screens load correctly, placeholder text visible)

seed_data_creation: Created temporary test user testfresh@tomi.com with business for UI testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 verified all mobile bug fixes: 1) Google-only user login now auto-sets password (200 OK) instead of 500 crash, 2) Register merges Google-only accounts, 3) All 6 frontend files have placeholderTextColor='#888' for visible placeholder text, 4) All main app screens (home, conversations, decisions, insights, control, chatbot, ai-demo) load without crashing. Database was cleared and cleaned after testing.

bug_1_google_only_login_auto_password.issue: Google-only user login crashed with 500 (bcrypt on empty hash)
bug_1_google_only_login_auto_password.fix: Login endpoint now auto-sets password for Google-only users before verify_password()
bug_1_google_only_login_auto_password.test_result: PASSED - Returns 200 with token, password persists for subsequent logins

bug_2_register_merges_google_account.issue: Google-only users couldn't set password via register
bug_2_register_merges_google_account.fix: Register endpoint detects Google-only users and updates password_hash
bug_2_register_merges_google_account.test_result: PASSED - Merged account can login with password

bug_3_placeholder_text_visibility.issue: Placeholder text invisible (white on light background)
bug_3_placeholder_text_visibility.fix: Added placeholderTextColor='#888' to all TextInput components in 6 files
bug_3_placeholder_text_visibility.test_result: PASSED - Screenshots show visible placeholder text with good contrast

bug_4_database_cleared.issue: User requested all cached users cleared
bug_4_database_cleared.test_result: PASSED - Login with any email returns 401 'Invalid credentials'

bug_5_auth_callback_deep_linking.issue: Android deep links don't work with hash fragments

backend_tests: POST /api/auth/register - creates new user with token
POST /api/auth/login - Google-only user auto-sets password (200 OK)
POST /api/auth/login - password persists for subsequent logins
POST /api/auth/login - wrong password after auto-set returns 401
GET /api/auth-callback - contains query param deep link
GET /api/auth-callback - handles both hash and query params
frontend_tests: Login page loads with visible placeholder text (Email, Password)
Register page loads with all 5 visible placeholders
Chatbot page loads with visible placeholder text
AI Demo page loads with visible placeholder text
